title: Remote Control Car Building Set, 1:14 Technical Sports Racing Car Building Kit, with Motors and Rechargeable Battery, Toys Gift for Adults & Boys Age 12+ (1314 PCS)
features: 【Product Details】 This 1,314-piece 1:14 scales high-fidelity Champion Super RC Car Building Kits measures by 14.7 (L) X 6.7 (W) X 3.9 (H) inches, suitable children for 8-16 years old, teenagers or adults who like to build technical cars.

【2 in 1 Multi-mode】Come with a L-motor, a Servo-motor, a remote control and a rechargeable battery (included), this building kit can build into a movable remote control car. With step by step instruction, this building blocks toys also can build into a static sports car for display.

【Exquisite Look】With its seamless construction, every detail is perfectly captured, including the butterfly doors, hood, rear wing and more. The race car is brightly colored with a front hood, classic openable scissor doors, mechanical roof, simulated engine, steering wheel linked front wheel steering, blue seats, smooth body lines, movable wheels, streamlined rear end, unique tri-color scheme, and sophisticated interior.

【After-sale Service】If you lost the parts during the assembly process, please don't give up easily and please get reach into us. We will send you a replacement for free and give you a satisfied solution.

【Ideal Gifts for Kids】Not only a building toy, but also a STEM car kit holds commemorative and collection value. An ideal birthday gift for sports car lovers, technology car enthusiasts and future engineers.This Educational set is a great gift for Back-to-School,Children's day, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving & New Year present.Ideal gift for Birthday Parties, Family Gatherings, or Entertainment with Parents. Gifts for 8, 9, 10, 11, 12-16 years boys girls.
description: Product Description Why choose our bulding block car？ 1. An ideal birthday gift for sports car lovers, technology car enthusiasts and future engineers. 2. Come with a papper instruction and a power kit Come with a L-motor, a Servo-motor, a remote control and a rechargeable battery (included), this building kit can build into a movable remote control car. Besides, this car can be controlled by Phone APP(applicable to some mobile phone models). Specification Car body weight: up to 950g Car size: 36*16.5*8cm Box size: 30*17*15cm
